response.justification: Candidate brings strong full-stack breadth, 15+ years of experience, and current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the agentic-development mindset required. However, the resume titles itself 'Senior Software Developer' despite a recent Staff title, and shows limited evidence of Python depth, large-scale distributed systems ownership, or formal technical-strategy leadership at the scale this role demands. Worth a screening call to probe Python proficiency, distributed-systems depth, and stakeholder/strategy experience.
strengths: Current hands-on work with AI agents, MCP, and agentic tooling at re:cinq
Broad polyglot full-stack experience including high-throughput systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching)
concerns: Python is not listed in skills; stack is JS/TS, DLang, Swift, PHP, Java, C#
Limited explicit evidence of distributed-systems architecture ownership at staff scale
Little demonstrated stakeholder management or cross-functional technical strategy leadership
